jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Lupin
jsonLd.description:
Lupin has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Lupin:
Lupin is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lupin!
